title: Utkal University – Research Associate – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Utkal University Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Research Associate (RA). Candidates with Ph.D Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 06-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through Utkal University official website.
